title: Village Taverns (RPG Series)
description: 🍺 Find cozy taverns in villages, have a drink, and maybe some rest.
body:
# Village Taverns (RPG Series)

![Taverns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bj4a8NjJ/images/9c8ad1dc3fcea05804336bacb415aef97a689a50.jpeg)

##  Features

Adds new Tavern structures to villages, in all biome specific variants. Take some rest in the cozy interior, get some food and drinks.

Adds new villager: Bartender
- Sells basic food
- Sells various potions

![Bartender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bj4a8NjJ/images/24d15aae9f9f74a05bf2bb0993bd324ae04e7704.png)

## Structure variants
- Plains Village Tavern
- Desert Village Tavern
- Savanna Village Tavern
- Taiga Village Tavern
- Snowy Village Tavern
